title: Intratumordrives ferroptosis resistance via D-lactate-STAT3 K631 lactylation in esophageal squamous cell carcinoma.
snippet: Tumor-resident microbiota are increasingly recognized as active components of the gastrointestinal tumor ecosystem, yet how intratumor bacteria reshape cancer cell stress responses in esophageal squamous cell carcinoma (ESCC) remains unclear. Here, 16S rRNA gene sequencing of 102 multiregional tissue blocks from 27 patients with ESCC, integrated with untarg...
